text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Do we have N >= 8 interviews and behavioral data?

conclusion.verdict: Run lighter persona effort; this methodology over-fits below threshold.
Wait until behavioral signals exist; interview-only personas are too thin.

branch.when: n_interviews >= 8 AND behavioral_data == true AND researcher_available == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full workflow with evidence chains + verification.

branch.when: n_interviews >= 8 AND behavioral_data == true AND researcher_available == false

conclusion.verdict: Halt at publication; do not release without verified_by.

example.trace: n_interviews=14 → behavioral_data=true → researcher_available=true → full persona spec with evidence.
